emails.subject: Bet
emails.body: Bet Since you never gave me the $20 for the last time we bet on CU/Texas, I figured I would give you the chance to go double or nothing on the second round. I think the line is Texas -9. Let me know.

emails.subject: RE: Bet
emails.body: RE: Bet Alright, I'll take the bet. I'll have to scrounge around to find 40 buck though! You know you're stealing money from my severance! I may need that to eat on by the end of the week. If you say the line is 9, that works for me. CU is on a role....it's time for Simms to go down! If you steal my money, you'll have to buy me a beer. To: Hatten, Micah

emails.subject: RE: Bet
emails.body: that sounds good 9 it is. we will go for beers regardless To: Bass, Eric
